diagrams.title: String Character Extraction Methods Overview
diagrams.description: A hierarchical diagram showing all character extraction methods in Java String class
diagrams.purpose: Visual overview of all character extraction methods and their return types for quick reference

diagrams.title: Memory Layout: String and Extraction
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how a string is stored and how extraction methods create new objects
elements: Original String "Java" stored in String Constant Pool
toCharArray() creates new char array in heap
substring() creates new String object in heap
Original string remains unchanged in pool
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate how Java handles memory when extracting characters, showing immutability in action
